title: minority_homebuyer_grant
audience: Minority first-time homebuyers in Marion County
goal: Encourage viewers to check if they qualify for the grant
hook: There's a grant in Marion County that covers your down payment. Most people who qualify don't know it exists.

scenes.headline: There's a grant in Marion County that covers your down payment. Most people who qualify don't know it exists.
scenes.voiceover: There's a grant in Marion County that covers your down payment. Most people who qualify don't know it exists.

assets.description: Black woman looking confident and determined, portrait

scenes.headline: Homeownership feels out of reach
scenes.body: Many believe owning a home is out of reach because of the daunting down payment.
scenes.voiceover: Many believe owning a home is out of reach because of the daunting down payment.

scenes.headline: The grant changes everything
scenes.body: This grant allows minority first-time homebuyers to secure a home with zero down payment.
scenes.voiceover: But here's the truth: this grant allows minority first-time homebuyers to secure a home with zero down payment.

scenes.headline: Picture your success
scenes.body: Imagine this: you, holding the keys to your new home, without the burden of a down payment.
scenes.voiceover: Imagine this: you, holding the keys to your new home, without the burden of a down payment.

assets.description: Black couple smiling holding house keys outside new home

scenes.headline: Check your eligibility
scenes.cta_text: See if you qualify — it takes 2 minutes
scenes.voiceover: Speak with a HUD-approved lender today to see if you qualify. It takes just 2 minutes.

voiceover_script: There's a grant in Marion County that covers your down payment. Most people who qualify don't know it exists. Many believe owning a home is out of reach because of the daunting down payment. But here's the truth: this grant allows minority first-time homebuyers to secure a home with zero down payment. Imagine this: you, holding the keys to your new home, without the burden of a down payment. Speak with a HUD-approved lender today to see if you qualify. It takes just 2 minutes.
thumbnail_concept: Smiling Black couple holding house keys outside new home
caption: Own a home with zero down payment. See if you qualify!
